task-1772218617502-vkim84.description: Review the contacts API endpoints in app/api/src/index.ts. Focus on: input validation, error handling, SQL injection risk, CORS handling, and route ordering. The 5 endpoints are: GET /api/contacts, POST /api/contacts, PATCH /api/contacts/:pubkey, DELETE /api/contacts/:pubkey, POST /api/contacts/sync-peers. The API uses raw http.createServer with if/else chain routing (not Express). More specific paths like /api/contacts/sync-peers must come before /api/contacts.
